text.title: Chaos Engineering Practice for Infra Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether chaos-engineering-practice-for-infra applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the system have a live SLO + on-call rotation + working observability?

branch.conclusion: Start with smallest blast radius; build muscle memory.
Run quarterly GameDays; convert each learning to a regression test.
Build observability FIRST; chaos comes later.

example.description: When `yes AND first_experiment` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r1` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
